questions.1_canary_text_source: The previous greeting Canary text comes from the hardcoded constant CANARY_TEXT in scripts/audio/audition-google.ts (lines 14-15).
questions.5_exact_final_string_sent_to_gemini: The final prompt sent to Gemini combines the performance instructions (EDUCATIONAL_PERFORMANCE or FEEDBACK_PERFORMANCE), the pace instructions (normal_educational or calm_slow), and the header 'TEXT TO SPEAK VERBATIM:\n' followed by the Arabic text itself.
